question: Identify all transformers in the fleet currently showing degraded or poor health status. For each flagged asset, retrieve its nameplate data and summarize which units require prioritized attention.
effective_question: Identify all transformers in the fleet currently showing degraded or poor health status. For each flagged asset, retrieve its nameplate data and summarize which units require prioritized attention.
answer:
Based on the results, the following transformers in the fleet are currently showing degraded or poor health status:

1. Power Transformer T-015 (ABB, 33kV/11kV, 5000 kVA, installed in 2016, 8 years old, 547 RUL days)

This transformer requires prioritized attention due to its degraded health status.

raw_plan.task: List all Smart Grid transformer assets with degraded or critical health status
raw_plan.expected_output: List of dicts with keys: transformer_id, name, location, health_status, rul_days, in_service

raw_plan.task: Filter the list to only include assets with degraded or critical health status
raw_plan.expected_output: List of dicts with keys: transformer_id, name, location, health_status, rul_days, in_service

raw_plan.task: For each flagged asset, retrieve its nameplate data
raw_plan.expected_output: Dict with keys: transformer_id, name, manufacturer, location, voltage_class, rating_kva, install_date, age_years, health_status, fdd_category, rul_days, in_service

raw_plan.task: Summarize which units require prioritized attention

scenario.text: Identify all transformers in the fleet currently showing degraded or poor health status. For each flagged asset, retrieve its nameplate data and summarize which units require prioritized attention.
